_toolManifest.note: Tool manifest for documentation; actual tool registration is in server.py FastMCP instance.

inbound.description: Messages from the dashboard arrive as channel tags in Claude's context

tools.name: speak
tools.description: Synthesize text to speech and play it through the user's speakers.

tools.name: speech_status
tools.description: Check status of a speech job, or get the most recent result.

tools.name: stop
tools.description: Stop current speech or cancel a specific queued item.

tools.name: list_voices
tools.description: List all available voice presets grouped by engine.

tools.name: set_output_device
tools.description: List audio output devices, or set the active one.

tools.name: diagnostics
tools.description: Return engine state and last generation metrics for debugging.

tools.name: vad_check
tools.description: Check if an audio file contains speech using Silero VAD.

tools.name: await_voice_input
tools.description: Block until the user finishes a SuperWhisper recording, then return the transcript.

tools.name: register_session
tools.description: Register a session with the Mod3 communication bus (ADR-082).

tools.name: deregister_session
tools.description: Release a session's voice and drop its pending jobs.

tools.name: list_sessions
tools.description: List all registered sessions with live device resolution.

tools.name: mod3_dashboard_post
tools.description: Send response text from Claude Code to the mod3 dashboard chat panel (Path B symmetric outbound channel).
